title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 26 2023

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 26 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures market rose sharply trends in the afternoon. an increase of 3.96%throughout the day. Some steel mills wait-and-see sentiment increased, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
